markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover to a new account manager and diagnose SEO indexing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Account Handover:** Vivek is departing GrowthX; Carrie Chowske is the new account manager for Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [**Indexing Failure:** Prophecy.ai has only 4 indexed pages due to three technical issues: sitemap submission lag, Webflow schema errors, and unoptimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** GrowthX will pause new content creation to prioritize rewriting old posts for SEO, aiming to fix indexing and drive traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX is transitioning from Scrunch to its internal tool, CheckThat, which offers historical data and superior tracking for Google's AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

## Topics

### SEO Indexing Diagnosis

  - [**Problem:** Only 4 pages on prophecy.ai are indexed, severely limiting organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
    1.  [**Sitemap Submission Lag:** Webflow's sitemap updates are slow (\~2 weeks), causing Google's crawl budget for the new site to miss new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
    2.  [**Webflow Schema Errors:** Unparseable structured data errors, likely from a template, block indexing. Google Search Console (GSC) provides the exact code location for the fix.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
    3.  **Unoptimized Content:** Older posts are too "thought leadership" and lack SEO signals, preventing Google from associating them with search clusters.
          - [**Example:** The November post "You don't need a BI tool..." remains unindexed.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [**Data Validation:** Looker dashboards confirm the problem, showing minimal traffic and engaged sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Decision:** Prioritize rewriting old content over creating new posts.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Fix the indexing issue first to ensure all content can be found by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Rewrite Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Add SEO sections and keywords to existing posts.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Maintain a "Prophecy's POV" section.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [GrowthX will submit rewrites for Cody's review before updating live pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking

  - [**Goal:** Track Prophecy's citations in LLM responses and Google's AI Overviews (AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Tool Transition:** Moving from Scrunch to GrowthX's internal tool, CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**CheckThat Advantages:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Includes hundreds of existing prompts, providing immediate data.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**Evaluation-Stage Focus:** Tracks high-intent prompts where users are actively seeking solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Superior AEO Tracking:** Offers better visibility into citations within Google's AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Carrie will add Prophecy's competitors to CheckThat and demo the tool next week.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Investigate and fix Webflow schema errors using GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Confirm the XML sitemap is updated, then resubmit it in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Review upcoming content rewrites from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Begin rewriting old content for SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Add Prophecy's competitors to CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Demo CheckThat to Cody next week.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQ4o9hQssQkHERUKv2yTwobK-bHGCxx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
